questions.question: Describe the key differences between a software requirement and a software specification. Provide one example of each.

A team is working on a software project with a development time of 6 months and a budget of $500,000. They must deliver the project to the customer within 2 weeks. What is the critical path in this project and how can it be managed?
Explain the concept of a 'WIP' (Work In Progress) limit in Agile software development. How can it improve the efficiency of a development team?
questions.hint: Consider the impact on team velocity and quality
